programme.title: Married At First Sight
programme.desc: (PG) Australia's most controversial social experiment is back. More couples and more pressure than ever. Tonight two weddings and a big secret is revealed that will shock one bride.

programme.title: Married At First Sight
programme.desc: (PG) It's wedding day for two more of our new couples. Is one of the grooms ready for a culture clash he didn't see coming?

programme.title: Married At First Sight
programme.desc: (M) We meet our first four singles and follow them and their families as they prepare for the biggest day of their lives: a day that should see them say "I do" to a complete stranger.

programme.title: Married At First Sight
programme.desc: Strangers are matched by experts and marry upon first meeting, embarking on a high-stakes social experiment. Couples navigate relationships, intimacy, and conflict while living together and attending commitment ceremonies. Through challenges and partner swaps, their compatibility is tested, leading to dramatic outcomes and final decisions.

programme.title: Married At First Sight: Episode
programme.desc: Strangers are matched by experts and marry upon first meeting, embarking on a high-stakes social experiment. Couples navigate relationships, intimacy, and conflict while living together and attending commitment ceremonies. Through challenges and partner swaps, their compatibility is tested, leading to dramatic outcomes and final decisions.

programme.desc: Strangers are matched by experts and marry upon first meeting, embarking on a high-stakes social experiment. Couples navigate relationships, intimacy, and conflict while living together and attending commitment ceremonies. Through challenges and partner swaps, their compatibility is tested, leading to dramatic outcomes and final decisions.

Through challenges and partner swaps, their compatibility is tested, leading to dramatic outcomes and final decisions.
